name: chatgpt-wrapper
description: Lightweight macOS ChatGPT web wrapper built with Electron and TypeScript.

scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --arm64
scripts.dist:mac:x64: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --x64
scripts.dist:mac:universal: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --universal
scripts.dist:mac:arm64:unsigned: npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac dmg zip --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:x64:unsigned: npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac dmg zip --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:universal:unsigned: npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac dmg zip --universal --publish never
